programme.title: E220
programme.desc: CHINA INSIGHT: The newly launched observation documentary program. Each issue takes a foreigner as the protagonist, travels all over China and observes China's social conditions and Chinese people's life from a close perspective.

programme.title: E475
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.

programme.title: E422
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: The program is focuses on marginalized society, throwing light on the lives of mostly unknown minorities and reveals their unusual experiences and explores their background for answers.

programme.title: Premium Spectacular: Black Gold: The Century-Long Game of the Petrodollar
programme.desc: In April 2026, the international energy market enters a red alert. The Strait of Hormuz has been blocked for over a month, the fate of the second round of U.S.-Iran negotiations remains uncertain, and oil prices continue to soar. Amid the turmoil, the 'petrodollar,' a cornerstone of U.S. financial hegemony, is facing unprecedented challenges. Currently, about 20% of global oil trade has begun to bypass dollar settlements. From military intervention in Venezuela to igniting the powder keg of the Middle East, are Donald Trump’s aggressive actions an attempt to reshape the old cycle, or a high-stakes gamble amid the wave of de-dollarization?

programme.title: The Bad Wolf's Great Fall
programme.desc: During the school treasure hunt, Humpty Dumpty hides eggs and serves as MC. Rose and students are repeatedly ambushed by the Bad Wolf. After a failed showdown, Rose tries to put Humpty back together and stop the Wolf.

programme.title: The Depixelator!
programme.desc: Albert spent months on his best assignment-until Flippy and Robbie's indoor basketball game wrecks his laptop. Motor fixes it, but the file is gone. If only they could go inside the computer! With Motor's help, they do-until Flippy and Albert get sent in an email!

programme.title: Periscope
programme.desc: Look round a corner or over a wall, with this clever device you can see like you're tall!

programme.title: Gas
programme.desc: It's invisible, but can put out a fire and change our voices ... In this episode Steve Spangler shows how to harness the incredible power of gas. What happens when he locks 25 people in a truck with a thousand mini-rockets filled with water and Alka-Seltzer?

programme.title: The Magic Number
programme.desc: In 1949, the mathematician D. R. Kaprekar from India came up with the ‘Kaprekar's operation'. Following three fixed steps, the outcome of this operation is always 6174. How is that possible? We'll find out in this exciting episode.

programme.title: Periscope
programme.desc: Look round a corner or over a wall, with this clever device you can see like you're tall!

programme.title: Medicine in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Falling sick in the Middle Ages is not a good idea! Dove has trouble finding a cure for Little Lewis when he falls ill. A consultation takes us on a tour of the wacky techniques and beliefs, along with typical treatments used in medieval times.

programme.title: Pumpkins and Dragons
programme.desc: Rose accidentally turns Regal Academy into a pumpkin patch. The teachers need a rare colossal pumpkin to reverse the spell. With help from Alicia, Puss In Boots' granddaughter, Rose, Hawk, and the others must find the rare pumpkin to save the school.

programme.title: Desert Coast
programme.desc: Four young adventurers explore Namaqua National Park in South Africa, a desert region with the largest concentration of succulent plants in the world. They learn how to survive in its harsh environment by learning ancient traditions.

programme.title: The Flowering Desert
programme.desc: Four young adventurers discover how plants, animals and people survive in the harsh desert environment of Namaqua National Park in South Africa. The short rainy season has started and the desert is in full bloom.

programme.title: Multiple applications of Magnets
programme.desc: How did people know where they were heading before GPS? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of magnetism. Have hands-on fun by constructing your own compass, and get to know An Wang, a computer engineer who revolutionised magnetic core memory.

programme.title: Doppelgangers
programme.desc: The kids see themselves in a new light and discover the errors of their ways when Yoko creates magical doppelgangers of them!

programme.title: Sound-sational!
programme.desc: Eric learns how sound waves work in the air and in water. Then he does an experiment to make sound waves travel along a piece of string.

programme.title: A Bright Future
programme.desc: Three adorable puppies get rescued from a house fire. Scarlett, the rotund mum of a family of Pomeranians, gets a pedicure before heading off to foster care. And feline brothers - Bill and Ben - are ready to find a forever home.

programme.title: Bacteria
programme.desc: In this episode, Dr Chris and Dr Xand look at bacteria, and show you an experiment to make your own fart machine.

programme.title: Working Muscles and Strange Healing
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand experiment on their own muscles to show how they work. Dr. Chris checks maggots that are helping heal a wound, and Dr. Xand visits the emergency room to meet one patient who got grit stuck in his head, and another with a sore neck.

programme.title: The Magic Number
programme.desc: In 1949, the mathematician D. R. Kaprekar from India came up with the ‘Kaprekar's operation'. Following three fixed steps, the outcome of this operation is always 6174. How is that possible? We'll find out in this exciting episode.

programme.title: Eggcellent Adventure
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts find a mysterious egg on the beach, and try to find out who it might belong to. They discover it's a sea turtle when the whole beach hatches at once!

E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E1 - The Big Deal
programme.desc: Claudia’s season starts off with a bang when she receives a $250,000 jade order, but things quickly turn sour when her crew questions if they have a big enough boulder to complete the sale.

programme.title: E6 - Cut and Dried
programme.desc: The pressure is on to find the big stones before the winter snow drives the team from the valley. A geological survey reveals there is a huge opportunity.

programme.title: E6 - Hurricane Lester
programme.desc: A Houston area school teacher, who lost almost everything in Hurricane Harvey, sets out with Bear Grylls to face a different side of Mother Nature. Along the way, Lester is put to the test, but proves that no challenge is too tough for his unbreakable spirit.

programme.title: E6 - Capturing the Wild
programme.desc: Conservationists employ sophisticated tactics to capture kudu, impala, and giraffe.

programme.title: E6 - Restaurant Launch
programme.desc: With only hours before the restaurant is due to open the kitchen remains in chaos. Together with Head Chef Himanil, Sarah must bring some order to the kitchen team as they try to deliver on Sarah’s new menu.

programme.title: E2 - Heavy Haulage Mission – Giants on the Move
programme.desc: Transports with difficulties. Whether a nearly 50-metre-long rotor blade or a 75-metre-long, gigantic gearbox with a total weight of 442 tonnes - obstacles lurk everywhere. The transport leads uphill, through narrow turns, past houses right at the edge of the road, over soggy paths and through narrow bridges. It requires the utmost precision and concentration, because mistakes are not allowed to happen here.

programme.title: E10 - Mindful Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Join Cody as he learns how to be a good brother & a good friend! In a heartwarming moment, Cody finds out he's going to be a big brother. After some initial nerves, he spends a special day with his mama & her baby bump. Then, the big day arrives as the family brings his new sister, Kendi, home! Watch Cody take on his new role, helping Kendi get to sleep & learning to play new games together like bouncing a balloon.

programme.title: E2 - Little Problems, Big Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are turning little problems into big adventures! When Mr. Vanderboos accidentally sprays hair growth serum on Daddy, Officer Freeze mistakes him for a hairy monster, & a wild chase begins! Then, Mila has a bad cold, but she still has to help Morphle figure out the right morphs to rescue a dog stuck in a tree. From playing a quiet game to avoid waking a napping neighbor to playing hide & seek with friends, every little problem is a big adventure!

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E2 - Nasas Journey To Mars
programme.desc: NASA is on a mission to send humans to Mars within just 15 years, but to reach this next frontier of space exploration, experts must discover brand-new technology.

programme.title: E22 - Nails, Microphones And Volleyball Nets
programme.desc: On this episode of Factory Made, discover how nails, microphones, volleyball nets, and candles are made!

programme.title: E2 - The Black Hole Next Door
programme.desc: When astronomers discover a rogue black hole speeding through the Milky Way, they investigate how much danger this cosmic monster poses to Earth.

programme.title: E1 - Aliens In The Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries.

programme.title: E9 - My Deadly Face Tumour
programme.desc: In Sweden, Kim has had dozens of surgeries on a huge facial tumour but stopped after a near death experience.

programme.desc: Mark and team seek revenge on self-centred office workers by rigging the ultimate non-smoking area. Then they payback office workers for rude elevator etiquette.

programme.desc: Rober and team unleash a police robot targeting double parkers. Then they take their revenge to the next level by catching distracted drivers in the act.

programme.title: E6 - The Good Girl
programme.desc: A young woman reports a brutal home invasion and the shooting of her mother and father. But when police interview her, they uncover an elaborate web of lies.

programme.title: E311 - The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: E314 - Princess Peppa
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig come for a dinner party with Mummy and Daddy Pig. Peppa and George are too tired to go to bed, until they are told a story.

programme.title: E909 - Sea Turtle Submarine
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are at the beach when they meet an adorable new friend: Shelly the sea turtle! But when Shelly can't find her way home to the Seaweed Forest, Blaze turns into a Sea Turtle Submarine to help lead the way!

programme.title: E112 - The Crew Does A Home Renovation / The Crew Builds A Lighthouse
programme.desc: The pups are starstruck when their favorite TV renovation star, Hank Hammer, comes to see them at work. // Cap'n Turbot is bringing Mayor Greatway a big surprise. But when a thick fog rolls in, the pups have to build a lighthouse fast!

programme.title: E116 - Hiccupism / Silence Please
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: E202 - Super Dad
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: E309 - Pups Save A Dragon / Pups Save Three Little Pigs
programme.desc: A fantasy fire breathing dragon comes to life and won't let Ryder and pups into the Lookout! Paw Patrol takes to the Air Patroller! // The Paw Patrol help three little pigs build new houses after theirs mysteriously disappear.

programme.title: E209 - One Last For The Road / The Little Critters
programme.desc: The Barbababies love bedtime stories, except if they are always the same... // Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: E213 - Watch Out For Barbabright / If I Were A Billionaire
programme.desc: The twins visit Barbabright's room. // If I were a billionaire, what would I do to achieve my dreams?

programme.title: E110 - The Crew Builds A Pig Barn / The Crew Builds A Giant Runway
programme.desc: A new farmer in town asks Rubble & Crew to build a barn for her pig! But will it be done in time for the big Pig Party? // Motor's super special birthday present gets delayed when the pups realize Builder Cove's airport needs a bigger runway.

programme.title: E413 - Construction Crew To The Rescue
programme.desc: When Crusher and Pickle are trapped at the top of a tall, rickety tower, Blaze, Stripes and Starla transform into awesome construction vehicles to build a way down.

programme.title: E324 - Fun Fair
programme.desc: The family go to the funfair, but Mummy Pig is angry when people at the fair tell her that she will not be able to win prizes in the competitions, just like George is sad because the mini golf course is too big for him.

programme.title: E325 - Numbers
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends learn how to count by playing games at Madame Gazelle's daycare.

programme.title: E318 - Rongisoit
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes Peppa and her friends on a train ride, where they must tick off what they see on their activity sheets. Meanwhile Pedro keeps losing his ticket.

programme.title: E111 - The Grass Is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: E911 - The Great Train Race
programme.desc: Blaze becomes a high-speed train to compete in The Great Train Race! But Crusher is in the race too, and he's determined to chugga-chugga-cheat! Will Blaze win and take home the Golden Train Trophy, or will Crusher knock him off track?

programme.title: E614 - Pups Save A Bat Family / Pups Save A Mud Monster
programme.desc: A rockslide traps a Bat Family inside their cave, so the Pups have to free them! The bats search for a new home leads to problems in town though! // Snowboarders on Jake's Mountain are stuck on a broken chair lift while a monster is on the loose!

programme.title: E213 - Watch Out For Barbabright / If I Were A Billionaire
programme.desc: The twins visit Barbabright's room. // If I were a billionaire, what would I do to achieve my dreams?

programme.title: E804 - Mandy Mouse
programme.desc: There is a new friend at Peppa's playgroup - Mandy Mouse. Mandy has a wheelchair, is very sporty and loves to play games.

programme.title: E408 - T-Rex Trouble
programme.desc: Blaze and Zeg are in Dinosaur Valley, showing off their amazing robot powers to their dinosaur friends. But when they discover three lost little Tyrannosauruses, they must use their robot powers to get the babies home safely.

programme.title: E616 - Pups Save The Balloon Pups
programme.desc: Giant balloons floated away from a parade and it's up to the pups to save the pup balloons, the parade and Mayor Humdinger!

programme.title: E13 - The Road/Shush Ninjas
programme.desc: This episode takes place when the Bears are young cubs! The three bears, on their way through the desert, come upon a giant warehouse - it's like an Amazon fulfilment centre. The Bears try to make this box-filled paradise their home.

programme.title: E11 - Follow The Balloons!/The Birth Of A Super Hero
programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are found in a balloon shop. Shiro rushes to the scene but the balloon has flown away. He jumps onto Deca's drone and discovers a whole new world.

programme.title: E12 - A. The Club/The Wand
programme.desc: When Gumball rejects 'The Rejects Club', the rejects wreak their revenge.

programme.title: E29 - See You There/Do Me A Solid
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby find out that everyone has been invited by Muscle Man to High Five Ghost's birthday party except them. They decide to go anyway.

programme.title: E411 - Arcade Trouble/Alarm Bean/Operation Wicket/Supermarket Ride/Bean’S Blooms
programme.desc: At an amusement arcade, Teddy accidentally gets put in a claw machine as a prize!

programme.title: E3 - B. Tree Trunks/Ricardio the Heart Guy/Business Time/My Two Favorite People/Memories o
programme.desc: Finn and Jake try to go on a quest while protecting Tree Trunks.

programme.title: E15 - Trust
programme.desc: As secrets surface, Amy treats a critically ill patient, Jake hides Rachel's health scare, and Sonya and TJ probe Joan's absences.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: E8 - If It Ain't Steel, It Ain't Real
programme.desc: Noah finally turns his lead fabricator, Scott, loose on a 1962 Chrysler 300 after months of reigning him in on other cars.

programme.title: E1 - Shark-A-Mania!
programme.desc: Showtime Eric Young ventures to Shark Central - the Gulf Coast of Florida.

programme.title: E2 - Sailfish Smackdown
programme.desc: Showtime Eric Young ventures to South Florida to go after the fastest fish in the Atlantic - the sailfish.

programme.title: E2 - Bubinga And White Bar
programme.desc: The Heineman Bar Company tackles an arduous indoor-outdoor bar in the harsh woods of Wisconsin and a polished white bar in downtown Chicago.

programme.title: E3 - Tropical Fun In A Ferarri Ffi
programme.desc: Arthur St. Antoine brings Maranello's all-wheel drive super sled to the Big Island and who better to accompany him in this tropical paradise than Jessi Lang!

programme.title: E3 - Drift Into Glory
programme.desc: The teams are learning to expect the unexpected. Team MR2-D2 is still fighting engine issues, and Team Blackhawk had to rebuild their transmission overnight.

programme.title: E12 - Come Chevhell Or High Water, We Will Revive Lucky's '66!
programme.desc: Tony and Lucky dig into Lucky's personal '66 Chevelle to wake it from a long slumber.

programme.title: E14 - Nowhere To Go
programme.desc: Fourth generation logger Bobby Goodson and his crew of men venture where most won't go and take on the dangerous swamp to harvest valuable timber and haul it to the mill.

programme.title: E4 - How Low Can You Go?
programme.desc: A spirited discussion about stance and paint leads the Boyz to visit the Peterson Museum of Los Angeles to see the finest examples of color, chrome and other details.

programme.title: E19 - Slippery Floor
programme.desc: The toys wake up to find themselves somewhere else other than the demonstration zone.

programme.title: E9 - Bingo
programme.desc: When Bluey has a playdate at Chloe's, Bingo must learn how to play by herself. But all the games she knows need more than one person! Luckily Dad has a problem that needs solving.

programme.title: E10 - Rug Island
programme.desc: On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: E8 - A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: Supertato and Tomato find themselves stuck in a slippery bathtub, whilst Evil Pea rampages around the supermarket on a giant soap-squirting machine.

programme.title: E5 - The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E2 - Hey Quacky!
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: E20 - Driving
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: E25 - Dog Loves A Book Again
programme.desc: Dog goes back to read the very first book he read - simple picture book. He meets a series of animals who try to help him find the Wumpus.

programme.title: E14 - Top Fun
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo's racer top speed to get his new plane off the ground. But when his flight goes wrong, Mojo and Bo have to take to the air in Mojo's jet top to help him down!

programme.title: E16 - It's Time To Build A Sandcastle
programme.desc: JoJo & Gran Gran go on a day-trip to the seaside to build a big sandcastle for Panda. But JoJo learns that things need not last forever to be special!

programme.desc: The Squirrels are having fun trying out games but are surprised to find out that Betty didn't always enjoy playing.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Fun With Japanese
programme.desc: Each episode focuses on a word as a theme, exploring its meaning and history while discovering the charm of Japanese language. The program also features dance performances of quotes from the world's great figures, visits schools to interact with children, and introduces classical performing arts and songs, making it enjoyable for both children and adults.

programme.title: Let's Enjoy English And Meets The World
programme.desc: Children search for wonders worldwide and challenge themselves to communicate with foreigners in English through puppet shows, games, animation, and more. Have fun and learn English naturally with a witch, Kyary Pamyu Pamyu!

programme.title: With Father
programme.desc: A children's program comprised of fun stories, songs as well as gymnastic exercises which can be enjoyed together with fathers.

programme.title: No Art, No Life
programme.desc: Self-taught artists are gaining respect globally. In Japan, such artists are making career-defining works, but few art fans or curators know them.

programme.title: E8 - Once Twice Three Times A Keloid

programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn buy a house that's so termite-eaten, they don't even need a hammer for demo! More problems appear as they peel back the layers.

programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes a delicious farm-style brunch for her family that's chock-full of flavor!

programme.title: E34 - Dream Breakfast
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: E15 - Super Cyclone 2000
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: Rassemblance S4
programme.desc: Between France, Canada and Switzerland, Magloire Delcros-Varaud meets inspiring personalities who have chosen professions based on transmission and commitment. They all embody a connected generation in search of meaning and authenticity. Through them, he gives voice to a strong and committed Francophonie.

programme.title: Edwin Fardini, Poetique De La Terre
programme.desc: The French lyrical singer, Edwin Fardini has sung a thousand and one stories yet never recounted his own. Through the creative process for this experimental work, he questions his dual identity from metropolitan and overseas France. How to be both? How to allow our different fundamental influences to coexist?

programme.title: Un Dimanche A La Campagne:2025-2026
programme.desc: A weekend together, far from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. A moment out of time to get to know one another, talk of love, friendship, life. In a house open to surprises and the unexpected, between emotion and laughter, each reveals the invisible thread of their personal story...

programme.title: E2 - Bimini Sharklab
programme.desc: Travel to a remote part of the Bahamas to unlock shark secrets. Do they make friends? Where do they give birth? Are some bolder than others? The answers may help protect these supreme predators for generations to come.

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.title: E2 - Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighborhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out both day and night. For the animals that call this home, it’s a daily battle to stay alive.

programme.title: E2 - North America
programme.desc: Experience the powerful, colourful phenomena that swirl across the heavens in North America. Watch polar bears search for food under the aurora borealis, map the frigid path of a polar vortex, and elude violent tornadoes with a prairie dog family.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E1 - Catching Air
programme.desc: Watch beginners make their first leap into the air, like an Andean condor who must attend flight school before spreading its wings. Meet oddballs who soar without feathers and marvel at a peregrine falcon’s speed as it dives to catch its prey.

programme.title: E2 - North America
programme.desc: Experience the powerful, colourful phenomena that swirl across the heavens in North America. Watch polar bears search for food under the aurora borealis, map the frigid path of a polar vortex, and elude violent tornadoes with a prairie dog family.

programme.title: E3 - Africa

programme.title: E1 - Lemur Spirit
programme.desc: This is the story of a day in the life of an Indris Family following a mother, father, and their three offspring around their home in the rainforest of Mantadia National Park in Madagascar.

programme.title: E4 - How Smart Are Sharks?
programme.desc: Often portrayed as mindless eating machines prone to attacking humans, sharks are more complex and intelligent than previously thought. Find out how these graceful top predators interact, choose friends, and even teach other sharks.

programme.title: E1 - January-February - the Year Begins
programme.desc: In the early months of the year, the Earth’s axial tilt brings the height of summer in some places and the depths of winter in others. See how life struggles to survive under these extreme conditions.

programme.title: Weekend Getaway
programme.desc: Drew Arellano treats two adventure-seekers to a weekend trip and shows them that traveling can be fun on a budget! Weekend Getaway will showcase affordable, off-the-beaten-track weekend getaway options in the Philippines and around Asia.

programme.title: Reel Life Weekend 'Kapag Iginuhit Ang Hatol Ng Puso'
programme.desc: A drama about a woman who fulfills her dream of having a husband and child, only to discover that the man she loves and her best friend are secretly plotting to ruin her life.

programme.desc: A fantasy-anthology series where Lola Goreng and her grandchildren share magical stories that teach values and life lessons to children and families.

programme.title: E9 - 尤長靖學妹超穩高音驚艷全場
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E9 - 50歲也要見「家長」？
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E51
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E1 - Joining The Herd
programme.desc: Levison Wood is in Botswana to follow the world's largest elephant migration. Travelling on foot 650 miles along ancient elephant pathways,he must overcome dangers.

programme.desc: Forest sets off on a dangerous, shark-infested search for the extinct Caribbean monk seal.

programme.desc: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighborhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out.

programme.desc: Jay develops a friendship with a bottlenose dolphin named Jojo. But when Jay is diagnosed with cancer, it is uncertain if she will be able to see Jojo again.

programme.title: E3 - Grazers Browsers
programme.desc: Follow the annual wildebeest migration of the Serengeti, where over one and a half million wildebeest follow an ancient pattern driven by rainfall and fertile soils.

programme.desc: Jewels of the World is a 3D journey of discovery through some of the world's most awe-inspiring landmarks.

programme.desc: When SpongeBob mistakes an escaped convict for his driving instructor, it's the new teacher who learns a lesson. // When Krabs sends him searching for a missing toy, SpongeBob finds himself lost... in the lost & found!

programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.desc: Luan thinks Mr. Coconuts is out for revenge when she replaces him with Lola in her act. // Hoping to drive out to the outlets to meet Lori, Leni ooks for alternative ways to get her driver's license.

programme.title: E248 - The Krusty Bucket / Squid's on a Bus

E2 - Patrick De La Cerde
programme.desc: After a man is shot dead at his doorstep on the night he planned to propose, detectives follow a trail of obsession and jealousy that leads to a dangerous ex-lover.

programme.title: Murder And Mayhem In Taipei
programme.desc: It's the biggest manhunt in Taiwan's history when three criminals rapes and murders a famous pop star's daughter, Pai Hsiao Yen, and go on to commit other crimes.

programme.title: E8 - Deadly Web Of Lies
programme.desc: When gambler Scott Martinez, 47, is found eviscerated by a sword in his La Mesa, CA, home, investigators can't tell who is telling the truth within his inner circle.

programme.title: E1 - Party Killer Or Innocent Bystander?
programme.desc: A Louisiana trail-ride dance party is cut short when shots ring out. A man dies, and his daughter's partner—who was standing nearby—is accused.

programme.title: E7 - Murderous Cop Or Innocent Gunman?
programme.desc: An off-duty police officer shoots a man in the chest after a social event explodes into a deadly argument between the two men.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: Vin Diesel and Paul Walker reteam for the fourth chapter of the franchise built on speed - Fast and Furious.

programme.title: Old Guy
programme.desc: Danny is thrilled when The Company pulls him back in the field, but only to train Gen Z newcomer Wihlborg, a prodigy assassin with an attitude.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: A series of spectacular evil crimes has risen and former super-villain Gru has been recruited to find out who is responsible for them.

programme.title: Not Without Hope
programme.desc: Four best friends went for a fishing trip. While attempting to free a trapped anchor, their boat capsizes, throwing them into the freezing water.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: A series of spectacular evil crimes has risen and former super-villain Gru has been recruited to find out who is responsible for them.

programme.title: Not Without Hope
programme.desc: Four best friends went for a fishing trip. While attempting to free a trapped anchor, their boat capsizes, throwing them into the freezing water.

programme.title: E2 - Soul Eggs In Purgatory
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines the flavours of Morocco, Tunisia and Louisiana by making savoury cheddar cheese grits topped with 'eggs in purgatory', a dish made with spicy tomato sauce, similar to shakshuka.

programme.title: E65 - Orlando: Briercliff
programme.desc: Our trio of flippers are ready to tackle a 100-year-old Craftsman home in upscale Delaney Park. With only one bathroom sandwiched between two bedrooms, this tiny Zombie needs a lot of work.

programme.title: E19 - Smoked Ham Hock Galumpkis
programme.desc: Chef Deborah puts a twist on the classic Polish dish galumpkis by using smoked ham hocks. The ham hocks and cabbage are cooked in a seasoned stock, while the stuffing is made from pork, rice and more.

programme.title: E11 - Windy Spirit
programme.desc: Back on the road, Theresa spends a few days in Chicago. Before braving a ride at the top of one of the city's tallest buildings, Theresa brings comfort to a woman who lost her mom after a brief illness.

programme.title: E11 - Windy Spirit
programme.desc: Back on the road, Theresa spends a few days in Chicago. Before braving a ride at the top of one of the city's tallest buildings, Theresa brings comfort to a woman who lost her mom after a brief illness.

programme.title: E11 - Small Space Big Taste
programme.desc: They say big things come in small packages, and in this episode host Michael Yo discovers that big flavours can come in small dining spaces as he squeezes into a four-table pancake house in Amsterdam.

programme.title: E12 - Food To Die For
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo tags along as diners test their fate with a toxic pufferfish in Tokyo before biding time with a potentially poisonous pokeberry-forward multi-course menu in North Carolina.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: Five celebrity friends go on a trip together but at each stop where it costs money, they will have to play games against each other to be exempt from paying. One final loser will cover the costs for all.

programme.title: E11 - Small Space Big Taste
programme.desc: They say big things come in small packages, and in this episode host Michael Yo discovers that big flavours can come in small dining spaces as he squeezes into a four-table pancake house in Amsterdam.

programme.title: E12 - Food To Die For
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo tags along as diners test their fate with a toxic pufferfish in Tokyo before biding time with a potentially poisonous pokeberry-forward multi-course menu in North Carolina.

programme.title: E19 - Smoked Ham Hock Galumpkis
programme.desc: Chef Deborah puts a twist on the classic Polish dish galumpkis by using smoked ham hocks. The ham hocks and cabbage are cooked in a seasoned stock, while the stuffing is made from pork, rice and more.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: The four final operators who will run the stores are to be chosen today. Master Yoo Jeong-su and Jeonju Mayor Woo Beom-gi bring their sharp, career-savvy questions to an intense selection process.

programme.title: E12 - Raquel And Samir
programme.desc: Despite being from different parts of the world, Raquel and Samir first bonded over their shared love of the ocean. Now married, they are racing to find the perfect coastal home.

programme.title: E12 - Raquel And Samir
programme.desc: Despite being from different parts of the world, Raquel and Samir first bonded over their shared love of the ocean. Now married, they are racing to find the perfect coastal home.

programme.title: Considering A Solo Trip? Eva Zu Beck And DW Reporters Share Their Experienc
programme.desc: Solo travel is on the rise - but what does it really take to explore the world on your own, especially as a woman? In this episode, global explorer Eva zu Beck and DW Travel hosts share their personal insights and experiences from years of solo travel. Be sure to watch until the end, when Eva zu Beck, Hanna Hummel, Sarah Hucal, Aisha Sharipzhan and Goenna Ketels reveal their most helpful tips.

programme.title: Visa And Travel
programme.desc: From the waves of Robertsport to the roads of East Africa, this episode crosses borders. We ask why it's so hard to move within Africa, follow a truck driver on the Northern Corridor, and discover Seychelles' Creole culture.

programme.title: Considering A Solo Trip? Eva Zu Beck And DW Reporters Share Their Experienc
programme.desc: Solo travel is on the rise - but what does it really take to explore the world on your own, especially as a woman? In this episode, global explorer Eva zu Beck and DW Travel hosts share their personal insights and experiences from years of solo travel. Be sure to watch until the end, when Eva zu Beck, Hanna Hummel, Sarah Hucal, Aisha Sharipzhan and Goenna Ketels reveal their most helpful tips.

programme.title: Malta's Heritage On Wheels: The Fight To Save Its Buses
programme.desc: Malta's hand-painted buses, each one unique, once ferried locals and tourists alike. Now few remain, lovingly restored by specialist coachbuilders. We also ride with police on speed patrol and test the VinFast VF 6.

programme.title: Can't Walk But I Can Fly
programme.desc: 23-year-old Luisa Rizzo feels most at home when piloting a drone - either as a cinematographer, or as one of the foremost pilots in the fast-growing sport of drone racing. Being born with spinal muscular atrophy means Luisa spends much of her time in a wheelchair, and racing has given her a sense of freedom and purpose. Can she continue her sporting success at the highly competitive World Cup?

programme.title: Priced Out Of Lisbon: When A Full-Time Job Isn't Enough
programme.desc: Lisbon is considered a dream city; but when it comes to its housing market, many people who live and work here are fighting to survive.

programme.title: My Holy Car - An Obsession Made In Germany - Part 2
programme.desc: More than 140 years after its invention, the car remains a source of fascination for many people. In Germany, for example, there are more vehicles on the road than ever before. For some, the car is a cult object. But it also deeply polarizing.

programme.title: Priced Out Of Lisbon: When A Full-Time Job Isn't Enough
programme.desc: Lisbon is considered a dream city; but when it comes to its housing market, many people who live and work here are fighting to survive.

programme.title: Malta's Heritage On Wheels: The Fight To Save Its Buses
programme.desc: Malta's hand-painted buses, each one unique, once ferried locals and tourists alike. Now few remain, lovingly restored by specialist coachbuilders. We also ride with police on speed patrol and test the VinFast VF 6.

programme.title: Can't Walk But I Can Fly
programme.desc: 23-year-old Luisa Rizzo feels most at home when piloting a drone - either as a cinematographer, or as one of the foremost pilots in the fast-growing sport of drone racing. Being born with spinal muscular atrophy means Luisa spends much of her time in a wheelchair, and racing has given her a sense of freedom and purpose. Can she continue her sporting success at the highly competitive World Cup?

programme.title: My Holy Car - An Obsession Made In Germany - Part 2
programme.desc: More than 140 years after its invention, the car remains a source of fascination for many people. In Germany, for example, there are more vehicles on the road than ever before. For some, the car is a cult object. But it also deeply polarizing.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E9 - Taco Comet
programme.desc: Uncle Grandpa and the gang go undercover to taste the most sought after treat in the cosmos: the taco comet.

programme.title: E14 - The Great Spaghetti Western
programme.desc: Uncle Grandpa helps save his favorite restaurant from Pizza the Kid.

programme.title: E16 - Uncle Grandpa At The Movies
programme.desc: When Uncle Grandpa and Pizza Steve cause a ruckus at the movies, Mr. Gus goes to extremes to quiet them down.

programme.title: E3 - Naughty And Nice
programme.desc: It’s holiday time for Top Chef, and Richard Blais and Brooke Williamson help spread the festive cheer by presenting a white elephant Quickfire challenge. Then, the Chefs receive an unexpected gift as Michelin starred super Chef Eric Ripert sits down with them to celebrate an elaborate traditional French Chrismas dinner. However, once the last bite is taken, Padma informs the Chefs that they’re missing the final part of the tradition of Le Revillon de Noel… the presentation of 13 desserts. It’s a midnight pastry free-for-all as the Chefs try to avoid being on the placed on the naughty list.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: Michelin Le Mans Cup
programme.desc: Over the years, the Michelin Le Mans Cup has become the main series for amateur drivers looking for an introduction to Endurance racing. Launched in 2016, the competition takes place on some of Europe's most iconic circuits. The MLMC is the first step into the world of endurance racing for the young stars of tomorrow.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

E4 - Best Fruit Forward
programme.desc: The home bakers bejewel a chocolate sculpture; the bakers create an appealing entremets that replicates a piece of fruit.

programme.title: E6 - Lights, Camera, Chocolate!
programme.desc: The remaining five bakers must rise to the occasion as they bake chocolate bread and use it to make a dessert deli sandwich; in the elimination challenges, the bakers must create a dessert inspired by an iconic film genre.

programme.title: E7 - Sweet Suspensions
programme.desc: The final four use their chocolate and confectionary skills to create a delectable trifle terrarium; with one elimination challenge before the finale, the bakers must create a three-tiered suspended cake.

programme.title: Darna
programme.desc: Narda, a typical schoolgirl, learns that her mother is the protector of a mighty stone. She takes up the mantle and transforms into Darna, a superhero dedicated to battling evil forces on Earth.

programme.title: Soco[Live]
programme.desc: The iconic investigative docudrama returns with gripping interviews and reenactments of real-life crimes. Veteran host Gus Abelgas is joined by ABS-CBN's top crime reporters: Zyan Ambrosio, Dennis Datu, Jeff Caparas, Lyza Aquino and Jessie Cruzat.

programme.title: Rainbow Rumble[Live]
programme.desc: Rainbow Rumble is ABS-CBN's latest trivia game show hosted by Luis Manzano. Five players race to reach the peak of a color pyramid by answering trivia questions and rolling a color die. Whoever reaches the peak goes to the jackpot round for a chance to win one million pesos.

programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: Kapamilya Journeys Of Hope With Fr. Tito Caluag
programme.desc: Kapamilya Journeys of Hope with Fr. Tito Caluag reflects on hope and the journey in finding and fulfilling the mission of God for them.

programme.desc: The longest-running Sunday musical-variety show on Philippine television -showcasing ABS-CBN's best and the brightest artists and world-class performers!

programme.title: E11 - In Dinard, With Caroline De Benoist
programme.desc: Mory Sacko is in Dinard with designer Caroline de Benoist. On today's menu: skate wing with cider and apple.

programme.title: E5 - Luxe De Poche/Selva Negra/Nathalie Seiller Dejean
programme.desc: An exhibition called ''Luxe de poche'' (''Pocket Luxury'') reveals the refined accessories of the 18th century, reflecting the habits and customs of the time. The famous traditional Black Forest cake drew its name from a German region. Nathalie Seiller Dejean transforms straw into a treasure trove of refinement. How to wear bootcut trousers.

programme.title: E20 - Var Special Programme
programme.desc: Hugo Guinet, organic market gardener and chicken farmer, sells his produce direct to consumers. All about truffle-hunting with the truffle grower Philippe de Santis, who offers his precious tubers at the market in Aups. The plant life of the Massif des Maures and underwater biodiversity of the Le Brusc lagoon.

programme.title: E3 - Savoie: Land Of Excellence
programme.desc: Whether summer or winter, Savoie is always a land of excellence. We meet Fombonne-Rouvier, town planner; Rene and Maxime Meilleur, chefs at a three Michelin-starred restaurant; Klebert Silvestre, bee-keeper, Nicolas Mathieu, crozet-producer and mountain guide; Pascale Vidonne, in charge of heritage in Bourg-Saint-Maurice, notably responsible for its Baroque chapels.

programme.title: E13 - Vegetable Mille-Feuille
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Benoit Garnier, director of the Nogent Cutlery Museum, into her kitchen. He concocts a recipe that combines his love of Italian gastronomy with that of his homeland: a vegetable mille-feuille with langres cheese.

programme.title: E5 - Special Arts And Crafts
programme.desc: Direction for to visit Rodin's home and studio. Ceramic artist Gregoire Scalabre sculpts and accumulates to enter another dimension, between tiny and gigantic. The John Galliano show for Maison Margiela: a journey through time and the strange. Artist Amandine Antunes masters the stucco marble technique.

programme.title: E10 - Julie De Libran
programme.desc: One of the most Parisian and unusual designers discusses her spring-summer 2023 haute couture collection. The focus is firmly on the versatility of the garments, the work on the bias and sequins...

In Search of Lost Time
programme.desc: In the late 1950s, Du Siheng was sent to Shanghai Orphanage by her mother, who couldn't support two kids. Later, she was transferred to Inner Mongolia and adopted by a loving family. Sixty years later, Du Sihan set out for Inner Mongolia and embarked on a journey to find his elder sister. The journey, however, turned out to be full of twists and turns...... Du Siheng couldn't adapt to the life on the grassland when she first arrived in Inner Mongolia. Touched by the love and warmth from the Mongolia people, the young Du Siheng gradually integrated into her new family. After six decades, the sister and brother reunited again and finally let go of the past. They reminisced the days when their fathers fought for the land beneath their feet and drew motivation from the older generation to work hard for a more promising and prosperous future.

programme.title: Kuch Kuch Hota Hai
programme.desc: Anjali is very friendly with Rahul. Rahul falls in love with Tina and marries her. This breaks Anjali's heart and she decides to settle far away. Release Year: 1998 Director: Karan Johar Awards: 5 Filmfare Awards, National Film Awards, Screen Awards, 4 IIFA Awards.

Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: In a touring opera group, the domineering star is hated by all. The lesser actors try to give him a bad time by posing as ghosts. Their antics attract the attention of a real ghost who comes to make fun of them. Stage old hand Seng soon discovers the mischievous ghost met a violent death. Seng promises to find his remains and bury him. Unwittingly, Seng buries the wrong bones which belong to the Vicious Ghost. The Vicious Ghost comes and leaves a trail of violence...

programme.title: Zu: Warriors From The Magic Mountain
programme.desc: An army deserter Di Ming Qi, who was chased by vampires in the mountain of Zu. He was rescued by Master Ding Yin and became his pupil. When they were ambushed by the Blood Devil, devil chaser Xiao Ru and his pupil Yi Zhen came to their assistance. With the help of Master Chang Mei, they managed to hold off the Blood Devil but they need to find the Dual Swords to destroy it. Master Ding took the wounded Xiao Ru to Celestial Fort and sought help from the Mistress, but was in turned poisoned by the Blood Devil and he surrendered to the Dark Force. Will Di and Yi Chen find the Dual Swords and destroy the Blood Devil?

programme.title: Zu: Warriors From The Magic Mountain
programme.desc: An army deserter Di Ming Qi, who was chased by vampires in the mountain of Zu. He was rescued by Master Ding Yin and became his pupil. When they were ambushed by the Blood Devil, devil chaser Xiao Ru and his pupil Yi Zhen came to their assistance. With the help of Master Chang Mei, they managed to hold off the Blood Devil but they need to find the Dual Swords to destroy it. Master Ding took the wounded Xiao Ru to Celestial Fort and sought help from the Mistress, but was in turned poisoned by the Blood Devil and he surrendered to the Dark Force. Will Di and Yi Chen find the Dual Swords and destroy the Blood Devil?

programme.title: Great Pretenders
programme.desc: Taiwanese swindler Mr. Giant loses in a poker match against Hong Kong swindler Wong Sheung Chin and they become sworn enemies. Meanwhile, Wong's apprentice Snake Wai meets Susan, a widow whom recently returned to Hong Kong from Singapore. Planning to con a big sum of money from her, Wai sets up a plan with his acquaintances Yam Sei-sung and Yip Mei-mei. However, Susan turns out to be a swindler as well. Unable to salvage a fortune from Susan, Wai, Sung and Mei become indebted to her. In desperation, Wai seeks help from his mentor and he has won back all the debts they owed Susan...

programme.title: It's A Mad Mad Mad World
programme.desc: News reporter Bill and his wife live in a public housing flat with their 3 daughters. Their dream is to get rich someday. When Lady Luck comes knocking on their door one day and they win the first prize of the local lottery, Mark Six, all hell break loose...

programme.title: It's A Mad Mad Mad World
